meta.source: San Diego Senior Games Fitness Competition official results
meta.note: 2023-2025 fully parsed from official PDFs (all divisions). 2022 limited to verified Yeager's Gym athlete results (Tonnie Dahl); legacy 2021-2022 multi-column PDFs were not reliably machine-parseable for the full field. 2021 had no Yeager's Gym athletes (YG first competed in 2022). Dynamax scored as distance (ft'in) in 2023-2024 and as a single number in 2025; scores stored as score_raw verbatim.
